recommendations.title: Why Did You Kill Me?
recommendations.overview: The line between justice and revenge blurs when a devastated family uses social media to track down the people who killed 24-year-old Crystal Theobald.

recommendations.title: High Society
recommendations.overview: Two girls from very different social backgrounds discover, at the age of 25, that they had been switched at birth.

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: Cria!
recommendations.overview: Ana, an eight-year-old girl living in Madrid with her grandmother and two sisters, mourns the death of her mother.

recommendations.title: The Parent Trap
recommendations.overview: Two identical twin sisters, separated at birth by their parents' divorce, are reunited years later at a summer camp, where they scheme to bring their parents back together. The girls, one of whom has been living with their mother and the other with t

recommendations.title: El patrullero 777
recommendations.overview: Follows Diogenes as he goes about his day as a police officer. He's prone to do things the right way, surrounded by a pretty much corrupt & citizen distant police department, & always resolves his duties with a personal method.

recommendations.title: Tell Me Who I Am
recommendations.overview: In this documentary, Alex trusts his twin, Marcus, to tell him about his past after he loses his memory. But Marcus is hiding a dark family secret.

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.

recommendations.title: The Elephant Whisperers
recommendations.overview: Bomman and Bellie, a couple in south India, devote their lives to caring for an orphaned baby elephant named Raghu, forging a family like no other.

recommendations.title: Fyre Fraud
recommendations.overview: A true-crime comedy exploring a failed music festival turned internet meme at the nexus of social media influence, late-stage capitalism, and morality in the post-truth era.
